calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Terrence P. Murphy, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Callen Cooper, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Lee Ellis Brewer, Jr.
Default was entered against defendant on March 25, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 22, 2010.
Statement of Damages was filed on March 10, 2010, and served by publication on August 7, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Callen Cooper, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lee Ellis Brewer, Jr. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $45,345.50.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney's Fees - Waived.
Costs - $848.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $46,194.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
